label: has growth temperature optimum
definition: The optimal temperature at which an organism achieves maximum growth rate, measured in degrees Celsius.

label: has NaCl concentration optimum
definition: The optimal sodium chloride (NaCl) concentration for growth, expressed as weight/volume percentage.

label: has pH optimum
definition: The optimal pH value for growth on the pH scale (0-14). Note: METPO:1000331 models pH optimum as a *class*; this datatype property carries the numeric value.
